description: Get dressed in these wedges from catwalk for a fun ethnic look. The beaded straps lend a dose of festivity to your look, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe. Upper Thong style straps for durability and protection Heavy bead work with woven detailing for added style Synthetic lining for soft comfort Midsole Synthetic footbed with stitch detailing for durability and style Outsole Wedge heels for better support TPU outsole with wave grooves on the forefoot for extra grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
